title: buildah: create WORKDIR with USER permissions

comments.body:
I am not sure but I am thinking of this approach where we can add `uid, gid` to `type StageExecutor` and `builder` can update `StageExecutor's` `uid, gid` field on every `Run(` so `func (s *StageExecutor) EnsureContainerPath(` https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/imagebuildah/stage_executor.go#L1572 itself can take care of assigning correct ownership to workdir and we might not need any changes in `imagebuilder`.

PS: approach in this above comment it just an idea I don't know if there can be more blockers ahead.
it turned out to be more complicated than I thought, but tests are green now
LGTM, need to get imagebuilder merged first and get @nalind Approval.
I'll need to re-vendor with the correct repo once https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/219 is merged
Changes LGTM but we need imagebuilder PR first.
@giuseppe I'll retest again, but the tests are still not happy.  Can you take a look please when you get in?

Looks like a real error in the copier code: 

```
] === RUN   TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot
[+3007s] === RUN   TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=false
[+3007s] === RUN   TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=true
[+3007s]     copier_linux_test.go:149: 
[+3007s]         	Error Trace:	copier_linux_test.go:149
[+3007s]         	Error:      	Not equal: 
[+3007s]         	            	expected: 2
[+3007s]         	            	actual  : 4
[+3007s]         	Test:       	TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=true
[+3007s]         	Messages:   	expected two readable items, got 4
[+3007s] --- FAIL: TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot (0.54s)
[+3007s]     --- PASS: TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=false (0.27s)
[+3007s]     --- FAIL: TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=true (0.27s)
[+3007s] === RUN   TestGetPermissionErrorChroot
[+3007s] === RUN   TestGetPermissionErrorChroot/ignore=false
[+3007s] === RUN   TestGetPermissionErrorChroot/ignore=true
[+3007s]     copier_linux_test.go:149: 
[+3007s]         	Error Trace:	copier_linux_test.go:149
[+3007s]         	Error:      	Not equal: 
[+3007s]         	            	expected: 2
[+3007s]         	            	actual  : 4
[+3007s]         	Test:       	TestGetPermissionErrorChroot/ignore=true
[+3007s]         	Messages:   	expected two readable items, got 4
[+3007s] --- FAIL: TestGetPermissionErrorChroot (0.54s)
[+3007s]     --- PASS: TestGetPermissionErrorChroot/ignore=false (0.26s)
[+3007s]     --- FAIL: TestGetPermissionErrorChroot/ignore=true (0.28s)
```
Also, if you have to adjust, can you vendor  imagebuilder to  v1.2.3 please?
New changes are detected. LGTM label has been removed.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *giuseppe* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)

/hold

it seems like a regression introduced by 985eec53912a5afaabe3a4abdfa054231f03ce38.

I am still investigating.  Not sure why it doesn't happen in the CI for other PRs, but I can also reproduce the failure on origin/main:

```
$ git log -1
commit 1b8c014f3eee13d26d126b945959087629505396 (HEAD -> main, origin/main)
Merge: 494e0a9c 5aeb38bd
Author: OpenShift Merge Robot <openshift-merge-robot@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 29 14:19:46 2022 +0200

    Merge pull request #3871 from turrisxyz/naveensrinivasan/dependabot
    
    Updated dependabot to get updates for GitHub actions.
$ (cd copier; /usr/bin/go test -run TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot)
--- FAIL: TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot (0.03s)
    --- FAIL: TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=true (0.02s)
        copier_linux_test.go:149: 
            	Error Trace:	copier_linux_test.go:149
            	Error:      	Not equal: 
            	            	expected: 2
            	            	actual  : 4
            	Test:       	TestGetPermissionErrorNoChroot/ignore=true
            	Messages:   	expected two readable items, got 4
FAIL
exit status 1
FAIL	github.com/containers/buildah/copier	0.046s
```
